_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Derived and verified from preserved, hashed artifacts; nothing added.

claim.text: The Registr smluv (official contracts register) returns zero published contracts for IČO 24278815 (Able.cz) and zero for IČO 06526411 (Blackfish & Co.) — searched 18 July 2026, result pages preserved. Neither company appears as a party to any contract published under the Czech contracts-register act.
claim.note: A genuine negative result from a successful query (the register only covers contracts with publication duty — mostly public-sector counterparties). This bounds, but does not disprove, the self-reported '4 tenders won' claim: no corresponding published contract was found.
